summarization.a: The figure displays infrared absorption spectra for two samples labeled as HF-BCl₃ and BCl3-HF, at 350°C during the 10th cycle.

a.question: What information can be extracted from this FTIR spectra?
a.answer: Changes that occur ruing each exposure of the reactant can be observed through the vibrational modes at different wavenumber values.

a.question: Which vibrational mode can be observed below 750 cm-1?
a.answer: Below 750 cm-1, Al-N and Al-f can be observed.

a.question: Which spectra shows the replenishment of the B-N bond?
a.answer: The absorbance spectra of BCl3 exposure show a positive peak related to the formation of the B-N bond at around 1250 cm-1.

a.question: Why is it not possible to observe a clear vibrational mode peak below 750 cm-1 on the HF-Cl3 spectra?
a.answer: This is due to the overlap between Al-N and Al-F.
